summary: Discord AI bot using Claude API (with Gemini/OpenAI fallback) that participates naturally in Czech conversations, responds intelligently to interesting messages, deployable via Docker with FastAPI management interface
description:
discord-bot
---
Má se zapojit v češtině do konverzace, nechci aby bylo poznat, že je to bot.
---
1. What should the Discord bot do? - pripoji se do kanalu a bude se ucastnit konveryace v cestine  2. Should the bot use AI/LLM for responses, or predefined commands and reactions? bude pouyivat cloude API ci gemini API ci OpenAI API  What are the main features/commands you want proste poslouchat a kdzy bude neco yajimaveho, yareaguje
---
Which API do you prefer for the AI responses? - v poradi Claude API, Gemini API, or OpenAI API Should the bot respond to every message in the channel, or only when mentioned/when certain keywords appear? na ypravu, ktera bude necim yajimava. Idealne kdyz pujde delat chytreho  Do you have a Discord bot token already, or should the documentation include setup instructions for creating one? nemam, udelej mi navod  Where should this bot be deployed? na testovani staci spustit tady z projektove slozky, ale priprav to na docker a pak to bude mit spravu pres prihlaseni a pak fastaapi. Aby slo pres klikatka treba zmenit token, kam se pripoji apod

tasks.title: Security audit for bot and API

Run and verify Discord bot functionality
Implement report generation after run command execution
